title: Top 5 Claude Cowork Tips I Wish I Knew from Day One
summary: Jeff Su shares five setup best practices for Claude Cowork after three months of business use. Key recommendations include keeping root files lean, structuring memory appropriately, archiving outdated content, migrating Claude Projects into Cowork workstations, and distinguishing between skills and workstations.
